error_signature: Base64 directly but don’t work, needs to be a XML
title: Base64 format not accepted for XML payload
symptom: When trying to send a Base64 encoded string instead of an XML file, the HTTP request fails with a message indicating that it needs to be in XML format.
not_this_if: Sending a valid XML file directly
root_cause: The HTTP request node expects the payload to be in a specific format, and sending a Base64 encoded string does not meet the requirements for XML data. The server likely requires the raw XML structure to process the request correctly.
fix_steps: Convert the Base64 string back to its original XML format
Attach the XML file correctly in the HTTP request node
Test the request to ensure it is accepted
agent_instruction: Convert the Base64 string back to XML and attach it to the HTTP request node.
